name: Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company
description_short: M&T Bank is a full-service FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, mortgages, loans, credit cards, and investment services across multiple locations.
description_long: Manufacturers and Traders Trust Company, operating as M&T Bank, is an established financial institution providing comprehensive banking services to personal, business, and commercial customers. The bank operates with FDIC insurance backing, meaning deposits are protected by the full faith and credit of the U.S. Government. M&T Bank offers a broad suite of financial products including multiple checking account tiers (EZChoice, MyWay Banking, MyChoice Plus, MyChoice Premium, and M&T Platinum Client), savings accounts, Certificates of Deposit (CDs), mortgages (purchase and refinance), Home Equity Lines of Credit (HELOC), personal loans, auto loans, marine and RV loans, student loans, and credit cards with rewards options. The bank provides online and mobile banking services, financial education resources through their Financial Education Center, and dedicated support for account management, mortgage applications, and investment planning. M&T differentiates itself through integrated wealth management via Wilmington Advisors, offering retirement planning, insurance planning, and education planning services alongside traditional banking. The bank emphasizes financial education with resources like M&T Money Smart and maintains multiple service channels including branch locations, phone support (dedicated lines for mortgages at 1-888-253-0799 and credit cards at 1-877-779-3525), and online account opening. They offer bilingual support in English and Spanish. As a traditional full-service bank, M&T is best suited for customers seeking stability, FDIC-insured deposits, and integrated financial services under one institution. However, customers primarily seeking high-yield savings rates, minimal fees, or rapid digital-only banking may find more competitive options among neobanks or online-only institutions.
services: Checking accounts (EZChoice, MyWay Banking, MyChoice Plus, MyChoice Premium)
Savings accounts and Certificates of Deposit (CDs)
Investment and retirement planning via Wilmington Advisors
Mortgage assistance programs and hardship assistance
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by U.S. Government, protecting up to $250,000 per depositor per account category
Multiple checking account options with tiered features (EZChoice, MyWay, MyChoice Plus/Premium) to match different customer needs
Integrated wealth management through Wilmington Advisors including retirement, insurance, and education planning
Comprehensive loan products including personal loans, auto loans, marine and RV loans, HELOCs, and student loans
M&T Visa Signature rewards card offering unlimited 1.5% cash back on all purchases
Mortgage specialists available by phone with dedicated support line and online application process
Financial education resources including calculators for savings, mortgages, HELOC rates, and personal loans
Bilingual support available in English and Spanish across website and services
cons: Website lacks transparent fee schedules for checking accounts, savings accounts, and other products
No mention of competitive interest rates for savings accounts or CDs relative to online banking alternatives
Limited information about approval requirements, credit score minimums, or eligibility criteria for credit products
No clear pricing for mortgage origination fees, refinance costs, or other loan-related charges
Dependent on branch locations for certain services, which may limit accessibility compared to fully digital banks

contact.address: 1 M And T Plz, Buffalo, NY 14203

best_for: Customers seeking FDIC-insured deposits and a traditional full-service banking relationship with multiple branches
Homeowners interested in mortgages, refinancing, or HELOCs with dedicated mortgage specialist support
Individuals wanting integrated financial planning including retirement, insurance, and investment advisory services
Small business owners and commercial customers needing comprehensive business banking alongside personal accounts
diagnosis: M&T Bank is best for customers seeking a traditional, full-service banking institution with FDIC insurance, multiple product offerings, and integrated wealth management services. The main caveat is that website transparency around fees and interest rates is limited, and customers comparing rates or seeking high-yield savings may need to contact branches directly or explore online-only alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 1 M And T Plz, Buffalo, NY 14203
meta_description: M&T Bank is a full-service FDIC-insured bank offering personal and business checking, savings, and mortgages.
